note: Synthetic ABI green learned from Himawari AHI's native 0.51um green. Replaces the old fixed CIMSS mix (over-greened low sun). G = c0 + cB*blue + cR*red + cV*veggie in post-sun-correct+Rayleigh pre-clip space. ABI only; AHI keeps native green. Coeffs intentionally NOT normalized (least-squares fit).
trained_from: Himawari-9 AHI 2026-06-21, 3 strips (WPAC ocean+terminator, Maritime-Continent vegetation, Australia desert), 1038005 px, cos_sza 0.02-0.85; fit R2=0.9988.
